description: This is a sample output from the categorization model.

notes.predicted_categories: Multi-label output. Each category with sigmoid probability > 0.5 threshold is returned. A transaction can belong to multiple categories.
notes.confidence: Sigmoid probability from the classification head. Range [0, 1].
notes.abstained: True if max_confidence < abstention_threshold (0.7). When abstained=true, the prediction is flagged for human review instead of being applied automatically.
notes.abstention_threshold: Configurable. Transactions with low-confidence predictions are not auto-categorized, reducing false positives.
notes.inference_time_ms: Wall-clock inference time. Baseline (TF-IDF+LR): ~1ms. DistilBERT frozen backbone on CPU: ~12ms per transaction.
